title: Social Teaser Promo Carousel
description: Design teaser carousels and social promo grids that work as standalone posts but also lock together into a larger release narrative.

zh-CN.title: 社媒预热轮播系统
zh-CN.description: 为新品、活动、剧集或角色发布做社媒轮播和九宫格系统，单张能发，连起来又能讲完整故事。
